From Our Kitchen

Food That Speaks for Itself

Every dish crafted with love. Tap any photo for a closer look.

Why Friend's Nest?

More than just food —
it's an experience

100% Pure Veg

Every item on our menu is 100% vegetarian. Fresh ingredients, honest flavours, no compromises.

Fast Delivery

Lightning-fast delivery within 2 km. Minimum order ₹350. Your food, fresh and hot, right at your door.

Pocket-Friendly

Starting from just ₹40. Cafe vibes without the cafe prices. Great food should be for everyone.

Dine In & Take Away

Cosy seating for meetups, dates, and study sessions. Or grab and go — we're flexible like that.

Explore

From quick bites to full meals, chilled drinks to hot chai — we've got every craving covered.
